use_cases: Form submission and action triggering in web applications
Primary and secondary action buttons in dialogs and modals
Navigation and link-based interactions with asChild pattern
Destructive action confirmations with dedicated variant
Icon-only buttons for compact UI toolbars
ai_summary: A foundational button component with multiple visual variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and size options. Built with class-variance-authority for flexible theming, Radix UI Slot for composition patterns, and standard accessibility features including focus-visible rings and disabled states. Forms the basic action trigger element in UI systems.
